actual_zone_zero_compliance_share.rationale: Contraflow throughput on US-191/US-20 under landslide-blockage risk; base just below the 98% target reflects realistic execution; downside captures Risk-1 secondary-incident cascade.

actual_drf_spend_usd.rationale: Bottom-up estimate of 24-hour spend on contraflow, airlift, N95, fuel caches, and National Guard activation; base just below the $500M ceiling; upper bound captures Risk-2 emergency-mobilization overrun.

actual_n95_staging_share.rationale: 10 CH-47 sorties × payload × utilization; base just below the 30% target reflects Issue-1 sensitivity; downside captures airborne-visibility grounding scenario.

actual_c2_fuel_endurance_hours.rationale: Issue 2 names 24 hours as the UPS-only baseline without engineering diversion; base reflects partial cache build by T+6 under jurisdictional friction; upper bound assumes full cache + tanker resupply.

actual_public_compliance_share.rationale: IPAWS reach × Decision-8 messaging effectiveness × historical evacuation-compliance rates; base just above the 70% threshold reflects realistic execution under Decision-8 Choice-1 messaging.

n95_staging_target_share.rationale: Plan commits to 30% N95/water staging by T+16; spread reflects how strictly downstream Zone-One commitments interpret the target — looser at the lower end, stricter at the upper.

public_compliance_threshold.rationale: Plan names 70% as the panic-floor threshold; spread reflects how strictly congestion-mitigation planners treat the threshold — looser at the lower end, stricter at the upper.
